skills.name: Win the Battle
skills.summary: game=pokemon_red | skill=Win the Battle | effects=attack_completed | context=use during any active battle to keep attacking until the opposing Pokemon faints, including rival trainer and wild encounters
skills.description: Use a damaging move in battle to lower the opposing Pokémon’s HP and eventually knock it out. Use this on your turn whenever a fight starts or continues and you want to win the battle in Pokémon Red.

skills.name: Heal at Pokecenter
skills.summary: game=pokemon_red | skill=Heal at Pokecenter | effects=clear_completed | context=use after a clear milestone or battle win to restore HP and PP at a Pokemon Center before continuing the route
skills.description: Use a Pokémon Center to fully heal your party’s HP and cure status conditions by talking to Nurse Joy and choosing to heal. Do this after battles, before caves/routes, or anytime your team is weakened

skills.name: Take Starter Pokémon
skills.summary: game=pokemon_red | skill=Take Starter Pokémon | effects=collect_completed | context=use in Oak's Lab at the start of the game to interact with a Poké Ball and receive your first Pokémon from Professor Oak

skills.description: Starts a new Pokémon Red game by advancing through the title screen and opening intro dialogue. Use it at the very beginning, from the startup/title screen, to reach the initial in-game opening sequen

skills.name: Trigger Position Event
skills.summary: game=pokemon_red | skill=Trigger Position Event | effects=position_completed | context=use when movement to a specific map location or NPC trigger is required to advance story or start a key event/battle
skills.description: Stand on the specific map tile or coordinate that triggers a hidden position-based event in Pokémon Red, such as advancing a scripted scene. Use it when you need to activate story progress or a locati

skills.name: Start with Squirtle
skills.summary: game=pokemon_red | skill=Start with Squirtle | effects=setup_completed | context=use during opening setup to enter Oak's Lab, choose and nickname Squirtle, receive the Pokédex, and heal at Viridian Pokecenter before heading north
skills.description: In Pokémon Red’s opening at Professor Oak’s lab, choose Squirtle as your starter from the Poké Ball table. Use this at the beginning of a new game when setting up a run that starts with Squirtle.

skills.name: Preserve Squirtle Safely
skills.summary: game=pokemon_red | skill=Preserve Squirtle Safely | effects=survive_completed | context=use in wild battles when Squirtle is low HP to heal immediately, safely finish the fight, or flee while conserving health and resources
skills.description: Keep Squirtle alive by switching it out before HP gets dangerously low and using safer teammates or items to finish fights. Use this whenever Squirtle is threatened by strong attacks, bad matchups, or
